mapper.select: SELECT ATTD_NO, EMP_NO, WORK_DT, IN_DTM, OUT_DTM, LATE_YN, OUT_AUTO_YN, ATTD_STAT_CD, REMARK, CRT_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND WORK_DT = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TASK_LOG_NO, TASK_NO, EMP_NO, LOG_DIV_CD, LOG_TITLE, LOG_CN, WORK_DTM, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM FROM DAILY_TASK_LOG WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND WORK_DTM IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(WORK_DTM) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 1 ORDER BY REG_DTM ASC, TASK_LOG_NO ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT T.TASK_NO, T.EMP_NO, T.TASK_TITLE, T.REG_DTM, T.DEL_YN FROM ASSIGN_TASK T WHERE T.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND NVL(T.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND T.REG_DTM >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6 AND T.REG_DTM < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 ORDER BY T.REG_DTM DESC, T.TASK_NO DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SCHD_NO, S.EMP_NO, E.EMP_NM, -- ✅ 추가 SCHD_DIV_CD, SCHD_TITLE, SCHD_ST_DTM, SCHD_ED_DTM, ALL_DAY_YN, COLOR FROM SCHEDULE S LEFT JOIN EMP E ON S.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO -- ✅ JOIN 추가 WHERE S.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND NVL(S.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND S.SCHD_ST_DTM >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND S.SCHD_ST_DTM < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
UNION ALL
SELECT AL.APRV_NO AS SCHD_NO, A.EMP_NO AS EMP_NO, A.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM AS EMP_NM, 'VACATION' AS SCHD_DIV_CD, CASE AL.LEAVE_TYPE_CD WHEN 'ANNUAL' THEN '연차' WHEN 'HALF_AM' THEN '오전 반차' WHEN 'HALF_PM' THEN '오후 반차' WHEN 'SICK' THEN '병가' ELSE AL.LEAVE_TYPE_CD END AS SCHD_TITLE, AL.START_DTM AS SCHD_ST_DTM, AL.END_DTM AS SCHD_ED_DTM, 'Y' AS ALL_DAY_YN, '#dd6b20' AS COLOR FROM APRV_LEAVE AL JOIN APRV_DOC A ON AL.APRV_NO = A.APRV_NO WHERE A.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND A.STAT_CD IN ('APPROVED', 'COMPLETED') AND AL.START_DTM >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND AL.START_DTM < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
ORDER BY SCHD_ST_DTM ASC ) FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT B.POST_NO AS NOTICE_NO, B.TITLE AS NOTICE_TITLE, CASE B.BOARD_TYPE_NO WHEN 3 THEN '인사' ELSE '공지' END AS NOTICE_TYPE, TO_CHAR(B.REG_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DTM FROM BOARD B WHERE NVL(B.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND B.BOARD_TYPE_NO IN (1, 3) ORDER BY B.REG_DTM DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT ATTD_NO, EMP_NO, WORK_DT, IN_DTM, OUT_DTM, LATE_YN, OUT_AUTO_YN, ATTD_STAT_CD, REMARK, CRT_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND WORK_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND WORK_DT <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY WORK_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN ATTD_STAT_CD IN ('PRESENT','OFF','LATE') THEN 1 END) AS WORK_DAYS, COUNT(CASE WHEN LATE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS LATE_DAYS, COUNT(CASE WHEN ATTD_STAT_CD = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 END) AS ABSENT_DAYS, COUNT(CASE WHEN OUT_AUTO_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS AUTO_OUT_DAYS FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND WORK_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND WORK_DT <= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
